name: pm_cross_consult
description: Structured PM-to-PM cross-consultation. Mandatory before requirements submission. Both pm_1 and pm_2 must use this tool to document alignment (or resolved tension) across the 5 mandatory consultation topics before calling requirements_submit.

topic.description: One of the 5 mandatory consultation topics

challenge.description: The challenge you are raising or the question you want your counterpart to respond to

evidence.description: Research finding or user insight supporting your position

resolution.description: Fill in when this topic reaches resolution — describe the agreed outcome
